regions.name: leaderboard_shell
regions.notes: Outer panel, separators, and control frames can be generated shell art.

regions.name: filters_and_tabs
regions.notes: Tabs, dropdown values, mode labels, selected states, and icon tab states remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: leaderboard_rows
regions.notes: Ranks, player names, avatars, scores, favorites, and row count remain runtime-owned.
